steps: File French Form 5001 with impots.gouv.fr to reclaim the EUR 3,744 overpaid withholding tax on TotalEnergies SE dividends
Submit documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and FR-NO treaty entitlement to 15% rate (not the 30% applied)
Contact BNP Paribas Securities to request they process the refund directly or provide supporting documentation for the tax authority claim

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
